reference: I have just had a chest X-ray because I had wheezing in my lungs. The concluding result was mild cardiomegaly. The wheezing is due to my asthma. What exactly is cardiomegaly and what is the treatment? I am seventy-six years old, five feet four inches tall, and weigh sixty-four kilograms. I had diphtheria as a girl and had a benign cyst removed from my breast forty-four years ago. My blood pressure is normal, and my cholesterol is normal.
text: I had just had a chest X-ray because I had wheezing in my lungs. The concluding result was mild cardiomegaly. The wheezing is due to my asthma. What exactly is cardiomegaly, and what is the treatment? I am 76 years old, 5 feet 4 inches tall, and weigh 64 kg. I had diphtheria as a girl and had a benign cyst removed from my breast 44 years ago. My blood pressure is normal, and my cholesterol is normal.
